message:
refactor(diagnostic): deep cx threading through generate_bundle_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Third caller-migration tick in the strangler-fig phase (follows
tick 122 reports.rs, tick 123 export.rs).

Rewrite `generate_bundle_with_cx` from pure pre-flight delegate to
fully cx-threaded body. All 6 internal storage calls now use their
cx-first siblings:

- storage.get_events → get_events_with_cx
- storage.export_workflows → export_workflows_with_cx
- storage.get_step_logs → get_step_logs_with_cx (nested per-workflow)
- storage.list_active_reservations → list_active_reservations_with_cx
- storage.export_reservations → export_reservations_with_cx
- storage.get_audit_actions → get_audit_actions_with_cx

Caller cancellation now propagates into storage's pre-flight
checkpoints for every section of the bundle. Mid-bundle cancellation
becomes observable at each storage boundary.

Legacy `generate_bundle` preserved unchanged.

Existing regression test `generate_bundle_with_cx_matches_legacy`
(tick 92) pins shape parity: the deepened cx-first path must produce
the same file set + manifest shape as the legacy path on an
uncancelled cx.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 78/78
diagnostic tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
